generated_oml:
namespace base = "http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#"
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://example.com/DTDFVocab"

instance PredictedTemperatureInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values from thermal model simulations"
]

instance CalibratedModelParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated thermal model parameters from experimental data"
]

instance CurrentTemperatureStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current temperature status compared to lower and upper thresholds"
]

instance SafetyStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System safety status based on statechart logic checks"
]

instance ModelValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Result of model validation through temperature uniformity tests and simulation comparisons"
]

instance CalibrationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Outcome of parameter calibration process using experimental data"
]

instance ActivateHeaterAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Activate heatbed for heating",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DeactivateHeaterAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Deactivate heatbed for cooling",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance WaitAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Wait for temperature stabilization between actuation cycles",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PredictiveThermalModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive thermal modeling for temperature prediction using Models A and B",
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictedTemperatureInsight
]

instance ModelCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration of model parameters using non-linear least squares optimization",
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibratedModelParametersInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for temperature regulation and actuation control",
    DTDFVocab:provides CurrentTemperatureStatusInsight, ActivateHeaterAction, DeactivateHeaterAction, WaitAction
]

instance SafetyChecksService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Safety checks via controller's statechart logic to maintain target temperature within safe limits",
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyStatusInsight
]

instance ModelDevelopmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model development based on energy flow assumptions, parameter calibration using experimental data, and validation through temperature uniformity tests and model simulation comparisons",
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelValidationInsight, CalibrationResultInsight
]

instance RabbitMQMessageBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication channel between physical and digital twins",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance RaspberryPi4PlatformEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B hardware platform enabling controller services",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SafetyChecksService
]

instance ScipyLibraryEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Scipy optimization library for non-linear least squares parameter calibration",
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService
]

instance OneWireBusProtocolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire bus protocol for sensor communication",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance PCBDesignEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "PCB design with MOSFETs and optocouplers for actuation control",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SafetyChecksService
]

instance TemperatureReadingDS18S201 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensorDS18S201
]

instance TemperatureReadingDS18S202 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensorDS18S202
]

instance TemperatureReadingDS18S203 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensorDS18S203
]

instance TemperatureSensorDS18S201 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer (accuracy ±0.5°C from -10°C to +85°C) with unique 64-bit serial code, connected via 1-Wire bus to Raspberry Pi GPIO",
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureReadingDS18S201
]

instance TemperatureSensorDS18S202 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer (accuracy ±0.5°C from -10°C to +85°C) with unique 64-bit serial code, connected via 1-Wire bus to Raspberry Pi GPIO",
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureReadingDS18S202
]

instance TemperatureSensorDS18S203 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer (accuracy ±0.5°C from -10°C to +85°C) with unique 64-bit serial code, connected via 1-Wire bus to Raspberry Pi GPIO",
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureReadingDS18S203
]

instance StyrofoamInsulatedContainerComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container (0.03 m³ volume) for thermal insulation"
]

instance RaspberryPi4PhysicalComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B physical device for hosting controller software"
]

instance PowerSupplyComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for thermal incubator system"
]

instance PCBWithMOSFETsAndOptocouplersComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for actuation control circuitry"
]

instance TemperatureReadingDigital : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Digital representation of temperature readings from physical sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureReadingDS18S201, TemperatureReadingDS18S202, TemperatureReadingDS18S203,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQMessageBrokerEnabler
]

instance ThermalModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model A with 2 parameters (C_air, G_box) assuming no heatbed heat accumulation",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyLibraryEnabler
]

instance ThermalModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model B with 4 parameters (C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box) accounting for heatbed thermal inertia",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyLibraryEnabler
]

instance HeatbedActingComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed (214×214×3 mm) controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers on PCB"
]

instance FanActingComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "12V/24V fan for air circulation (airflow 0.02 m³/s) actuated through PCB circuitry"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system with styrofoam insulated container (0.03 m³ volume), heatbed (214×214×3 mm), fan (airflow 0.02 m³/s), temperature sensors, Raspberry Pi controller, PCB, and power supply",
    base:contains StyrofoamInsulatedContainerComponent, RaspberryPi4PhysicalComponent, PowerSupplyComponent, PCBWithMOSFETsAndOptocouplersComponent, TemperatureSensorDS18S201, TemperatureSensorDS18S202, TemperatureSensorDS18S203, HeatbedActingComponent, FanActingComponent
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Controller sends actuation commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan control) via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which translates these into hardware control signals through MOSFETs and optocouplers."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated system where physical components (heatbed, fan, sensors) communicate via RabbitMQ with DT components (controller, low-level driver, simulation models), forming a closed-loop system for monitoring and control."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Assumptions tested experimentally (e.g., temperature uniformity via three-sensor setup), model parameters calibrated to minimize residual error against experimental data, and validation of model predictions against real-world measurements."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for data exchange between physical and virtual components; 1-Wire bus for sensor communication with Raspberry Pi."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server and all DT components (controller, low-level driver) deployed on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol incorporated into the low-level driver to maintain device safety during operation, preventing unsafe actuation states."
]
